# Evaluate Copilot Studio Advanced

## Step 1: Prerequisites
- Azure CLI logged in
- Microsoft Copilot Studio, Azure OpenAI, Dataverse, Microsoft Graph, Power Platform access

## Step 2: Execute
```bash
node engine/index.js solution-plays/40-copilot-studio-advanced/fai-manifest.json --eval
```

## Step 3: Verify
Confirm results meet thresholds.
